header.title: Flag Configurator
header.description: Select your size and layout, upload your design, tweak the 3D preview, and save.

upload.title: Drop graphic here
upload.subtitle: or click to browse your files

ar.unavailable_label: AR preview unavailable on this device

toasts.ar_support_resolved_msg: Ready for AR! Tap the green AR button on the right to place the flag in the real world.
toasts.ar_unsupported_msg: This device or browser does not support AR preview.
toasts.ar_active_msg: Move your device to find a surface, then tap to place. Drag to rotate.
toasts.ar_placed_msg: Tap again on another surface if you want to reposition the flag.
toasts.load_failed_msg: Could not load the PDF saving libraries. Please check your internet connection.
toasts.preview_loading_msg: Please wait for the 3D preview to finish loading before uploading graphic.
toasts.env_unavailable_msg: Studio lighting could not be loaded. Continuing with the default background.
toasts.ref_failed_msg: Could not load the 3D character model.
toasts.preview_ready_no_save: Graphic tools are ready, but design saving is currently unavailable.
toasts.preview_ready_msg: Pick a size and layout, upload your design, tweak the preview, and save.
toasts.graphic_applied_failed: The {{label}} graphic could not be processed.
toasts.graphic_removed_msg: {{label}} graphic has been cleared from the preview.
toasts.saving_design_msg: Capturing front and back layouts for your design.
toasts.design_saved_msg: Your custom flag design has been saved successfully.
toasts.save_failed_msg: Unable to save your design. Please try again.
toasts.ar_placement_unavailable_msg: Hit testing could not be started for this session.
toasts.pdf_error_msg: Failed to read or convert the PDF file.
toasts.processing_pdf_msg: Converting the first page of the PDF to a high-quality WebP image.
toasts.processing_image_msg: Formatting the image to a high-fidelity WebP texture.
toasts.image_error_msg: Failed to process the uploaded image.
toasts.unsupported_file_msg: Please upload a PNG, JPG, JPEG, WEBP, or PDF file.
